codeReview.summary: Implementation of socket focus commands (VAL-API-004) is complete and correct. The feature provides focus.set, focus.next, focus.previous, and focus.current commands that properly change the active workspace through the existing switch_to_workspace() function. All 98 tests pass including parsing, response formatting, focus state logic, and socket integration tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill references OpenSim backend project paths and commands, but the actual mission (cmux-linux) is a different project. The worker correctly ignored the skill's incorrect setup instructions and instead read the mission-specific AGENTS.md for guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file at .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md mentions '/home/bills/dev/opensim/backend' paths, but mission is in /home/bills/dev/cmux-linux. Transcript shows worker invoked backend-worker skill but then read /home/bills/.factory/missions/7acba9ab-26e3-4c7c-bfcc-6b7f1532aee0/AGENTS.md which correctly describes cmux-linux.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly added focus-commands-build and focus-commands-test commands to services.yaml for VAL-API-004. These commands were missing before and are now properly documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Added to .factory/services.yaml: focus-commands-build and focus-commands-test commands with proper gcc compilation and test execution commands.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. All expected behaviors are implemented: focus.set changes active pane, focus.next/previous work with wrap-around, and JSON responses confirm focus changes. 98 tests cover parsing, formatting, logic, and socket integration. The worker correctly followed procedures by reading mission-specific context and updating services.yaml. Minor observation: the backend-worker skill has outdated project references but worker navigated this correctly.
